The '''Bavakar''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]], members of which specialized in biological enhancements and related technologies.<ref name="CSWE" /> The species shared its name with the [[Bavakar Medical Research Labs]] company<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> that was in business by [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Bavakar were introduced in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="CSWE" />
